summary: The diff addresses all three requirements. REQ-76 is fully addressed in App.tsx with synchronous session check via lazy useState initializer. REQ-78 is fully addressed in auth.ts with comprehensive try-catch wrapping around all localStorage operations and module-level seeding. REQ-77 is partially addressed — index.html is updated with the root div and background color fix, but main.tsx is listed as an immutable file and was not modified; however, the requirement to audit main.tsx and ensure no silent failures is not evidenced in the diff as a code change.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit frontend/src/main.tsx entry point to ensure the React app mounts correctly on all page loads, that createRoot never fails silently, and no uncaught JavaScript errors during initialization prevent the app from rendering.
missing_requirements.reason: main.tsx is listed as an immutable path and was not modified. No evidence in the diff of error handling or defensive coding being added to main.tsx to prevent silent failures of createRoot.
